history.en: The Somali lives life to the fullest. He climbs higher, jumps farther, plays harder. Nothing escapes the notice of this highly intelligent and inquisitive cat. Somalis love the company of humans and other animals.
history.zh: 索马里猫尽情享受生活。它们爬得更高、跳得更远、玩得更尽兴。没有什么能逃过这种高度聪明和好奇的猫的注意。索马里猫喜欢人类和其他动物的陪伴。

overview.en: The Somali cat is a lively, intelligent, and affectionate breed known for its playful and inquisitive nature. With a striking ticked coat and a bushy tail reminiscent of a fox, Somalis are often described as 'clowns of the cat world' due to their mischievous antics. They are highly social, forming strong bonds with their human companions and getting along well with other pets. Their tenacity and intelligence make them excellent problem-solvers, always exploring their surroundings. Despite their active demeanor, they are also gentle and enjoy cuddling. This breed thrives on interaction and can become bored or destructive if left alone for long periods. Overall, the Somali is a perfect blend of energy and affection, making them a delightful addition to any household.
overview.zh: 索马里猫是一种活泼、聪明且深情的品种，以其顽皮和好奇的天性而闻名。它们拥有醒目的刺鼠纹被毛和蓬松的尾巴，酷似狐狸，常因恶作剧而被形容为‘猫界小丑’。索马里猫高度社交，与人类伙伴建立深厚感情，也能与其他宠物和睦相处。它们的坚韧和智慧使其成为出色的解决问题能手，总是探索周围环境。尽管活跃，它们也温顺，喜欢依偎。这个品种需要互动，长时间独处可能会感到无聊或产生破坏行为。总体而言，索马里猫是活力与情感的完美结合，是任何家庭的绝佳伴侣。

care.en: Daily care for a Somali cat includes regular grooming to maintain their semi-long, ticked coat. Brush them 2-3 times per week to prevent matting and reduce shedding. They are active cats requiring at least 30-60 minutes of interactive play daily, such as chasing toys or climbing cat trees. Provide a scratching post to satisfy their natural instincts. Annual veterinary check-ups are essential, along with vaccinations and dental care. Keep their litter box clean, and trim nails every 2-3 weeks. Since Somalis are curious, ensure a safe environment by securing windows and removing toxic plants. Regular ear cleaning and dental hygiene will keep them healthy.
care.zh: 索马里猫的日常护理包括定期梳理其半长毛的刺鼠纹被毛。每周刷毛2-3次，防止打结并减少掉毛。它们活跃，每天需要至少30-60分钟的互动游戏，如追逐玩具或攀爬猫树。提供抓柱以满足其自然本能。每年兽医检查必不可少，包括疫苗接种和牙齿护理。保持猫砂盆清洁，每2-3周修剪指甲。由于索马里猫好奇，确保环境安全，固定窗户并移除有毒植物。定期清洁耳朵和保持口腔卫生将使其保持健康。

training.en: Somali cats are highly intelligent and respond well to positive reinforcement training. Use treats, praise, and clicker training to teach tricks, fetch, or leash walking. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) to maintain their interest. They enjoy puzzle toys that challenge their problem-solving skills. Consistency is key—set clear rules and boundaries from the start. Avoid punishment, as they can become stubborn or withdrawn. Early socialization with people and other animals is crucial. Training not only stimulates their mind but also strengthens your bond. With patience, you can teach them to come when called or perform amusing behaviors.
training.zh: 索马里猫非常聪明，对正强化训练反应良好。使用零食、赞美和响片训练来教授技巧、寻回或牵绳散步。保持训练时间短（5-10分钟）以维持兴趣。它们喜欢挑战解决问题能力的益智玩具。一致性是关键——从一开始就设定明确的规则和界限。避免惩罚，否则它们可能变得固执或退缩。早期与人和其他动物社交至关重要。训练不仅能刺激它们的思维，还能加强你们的纽带。耐心教导，它们可以学会叫名字过来或做出有趣的行为。

diet.en: Feed your Somali cat a high-quality, protein-rich diet appropriate for their life stage (kitten, adult, senior). Look for real meat as the first ingredient. Provide a mix of wet and dry food to ensure hydration and dental health. Portion control is important to prevent obesity, as Somalis are active but can overeat. Offer 2-3 measured meals per day rather than free-feeding. Fresh water should always be available. Avoid foods with fillers like corn or wheat. Consider supplements like omega-3 fatty acids for coat health. Consult your vet for specific dietary needs, especially if your cat has allergies or health issues.
diet.zh: 为索马里猫提供适合其生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）的高质量、富含蛋白质的饮食。寻找以真实肉类为首要成分的食物。混合湿粮和干粮以确保水分摄入和牙齿健康。控制食量以防肥胖，因为索马里猫活跃但可能过度进食。每天提供2-3次定量餐，而非自由采食。始终提供新鲜饮水。避免含有玉米或小麦等填充物的食物。可考虑补充欧米伽-3脂肪酸以促进皮毛健康。咨询兽医了解特定饮食需求，尤其是如果猫有过敏或健康问题。

livingTips.en: Somalis adapt well to apartments if provided with vertical spaces like cat trees and shelves for climbing. They need ample interactive toys and playtime to burn energy. A secure balcony or catio is ideal for safe outdoor exploration. They are excellent with children and other pets, especially if socialized early. Their social nature means they do best in homes where someone is present most of the day; consider a companion pet if you work long hours. Keep windows and balconies secure to prevent escapes. Provide hiding spots and quiet areas for rest. Overall, a stimulating environment with plenty of attention keeps a Somali happy.
livingTips.zh: 索马里猫能很好地适应公寓生活，只要提供垂直空间如猫树和架子供攀爬。它们需要大量互动玩具和游戏时间来消耗精力。安全的阳台或猫笼是理想的安全户外探索场所。它们与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽，尤其如果早期社交。它们的社交天性意味着最好有主人大部分时间在家；如果工作时间长，考虑养一只伴侣宠物。确保窗户和阳台安全以防逃脱。提供藏身之处和安静区域休息。总之，一个充满刺激和关注的环境能让索马里猫快乐。
